notes.text: Pages diverged on column-building. propertyphotography/page.tsx has its OWN inline buildColumns (lines 72-107): switch on photos.length (16/14/9/6 -> preset splits; else 4-col branch injecting forcedRatio '2752/1536' on photo 3). Does NOT import galleryColumns. foodphotography/page.tsx imports buildColumns+GalleryLayout from ./galleryColumns with per-restaurant layout configs. Both feed GalleryGrid columns:Photo[][]+photos.

Uniform 3:4 refactor: change GalleryGrid to render a responsive CSS grid from the flat `photos` array and DROP the `columns` prop. Lightbox already keys off `photos`, unaffected. Eliminates both buildColumns impls.

Dead-code after refactor: galleryColumns.ts likely unused, property page local buildColumns + 2752/1536 override removed. Must grep to confirm no other importers of galleryColumns before deleting (grep currently hook-blocked here; verify in plan/build).

payload.context: Discuss: blast-radius check of property page for the uniform 3:4 grid refactor.
